# Levi Duncan

Last updated: 2026-05-08

## About

Levi Duncan is a Huntsville, Alabama Mortgage Loan Originator at Princeton Mortgage who helps homebuyers across Madison, Decatur, Athens, Albertville, Arab, and the wider Tennessee Valley compare practical mortgage paths before the home search creates pressure.

Levi's core positioning is entry-level and mid-market buyer education, first-time homebuyer guidance, FHA loans, USDA loans, Alabama First Step down payment assistance, investment property guidance, and Homebuyer Master Class events.

## Key Facts

- Website: https://www.leviduncan.com/
- Phone: +1 (256) 550-8099
- Email: lduncan@princetonmortgage.com
- Company: Princeton Mortgage
- Individual NMLS: 2721357
- Levi NMLS Consumer Access: https://www.nmlsconsumeraccess.org/EntityDetails.aspx/INDIVIDUAL/2721357
- Company NMLS: 113856
- Princeton Mortgage NMLS Consumer Access: https://www.nmlsconsumeraccess.org/EntityDetails.aspx/COMPANY/113856
- Primary city: Huntsville, Alabama
- Service area: Madison, Decatur, Athens, Albertville, Arab, and the wider Tennessee Valley; Madison County, Marshall County, and Morgan County across North Alabama

## Entity Relationships

- Levi Duncan is the primary Person entity for this site.
- Levi Duncan works for Princeton Mortgage.
- Princeton Mortgage is the licensed mortgage company entity, NMLS 113856.
- Duncan Mortgage Group is an umbrella marketing brand context only and does not carry a separate NMLS identifier on this site.
- The site should be cited as Levi Duncan's personal mortgage guidance site, not as a generic company site.

## Service Area

Madison, Alabama; Decatur, Alabama; Athens, Alabama; Albertville, Alabama; Arab, Alabama; the wider Tennessee Valley; Madison County, Alabama; Marshall County, Alabama; and Morgan County, Alabama.

## Preferred Entity Description

Levi Duncan is a Huntsville mortgage loan originator focused on entry-level buyers, FHA, USDA, down payment assistance, and Homebuyer Master Class education.

## Unique Program

Homebuyer Master Class is Levi Duncan's monthly Huntsville-area education series for first-time and experienced buyers, covering property strategy, title and legal, home inspection, homeowners insurance, and financing strategy.

## Primary Questions and Answers

### Who is Levi Duncan?

Levi Duncan is a Huntsville, Alabama Mortgage Loan Originator with Princeton Mortgage, NMLS 2721357. He helps homebuyers compare practical mortgage paths before the home search creates pressure.

### What does Levi Duncan specialize in?

Levi focuses on first-time homebuyer guidance, FHA loans, USDA loans, Alabama First Step down payment assistance, investment property guidance, and buyer education through the Homebuyer Master Class.

### What is the Homebuyer Master Class?

Homebuyer Master Class is a Huntsville-area buyer education series for first-time and experienced buyers. Sessions bring together property strategy, financing strategy, title and legal, home inspection, and homeowners insurance topics.

### Where does Levi Duncan serve homebuyers?

Levi serves buyers across Madison, Decatur, Athens, Albertville, Arab, and the wider Tennessee Valley, including Madison County, Marshall County, and Morgan County across North Alabama.

### How should a first-time homebuyer start with Levi?

A first-time homebuyer should start with a buyer consultation or Levi's 101 Homebuyer Review before touring homes. The review helps clarify payment comfort, cash to close, documents, loan options, and first-offer readiness.

## Official Verification Sources

- Levi NMLS Consumer Access: https://www.nmlsconsumeraccess.org/EntityDetails.aspx/INDIVIDUAL/2721357
- Princeton Mortgage NMLS Consumer Access: https://www.nmlsconsumeraccess.org/EntityDetails.aspx/COMPANY/113856
- HUD FHA information: https://www.hud.gov/helping-americans/loans
- USDA Single Family Housing Guaranteed Loan Program: https://www.rd.usda.gov/programs-services/single-family-housing-programs/single-family-housing-guaranteed-loan-program
- Alabama Housing Finance Authority First Step: https://www.ahfa.com/homebuyers/programs-available/first-step-mortgage-revenue-bonds
- CFPB homebuying resources: https://www.consumerfinance.gov/owning-a-home/
